source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/2023 시험소 규격업데이트/ADD/접수자료/EMC 접수자료 231219/1. Basic Safety Essential Performance and Pass Fail Criteria/ADD(1G) Detector Specific test conditions (Annex F) 231220.docx

document.title: Specific test conditions for IEC 60601-1-2 BASIC SAFETY, ESSENTIAL PERFORMANCE
document.documentType: Specific test conditions / EMC immunity pass/fail criteria

sourceSummary.oneLine: Defines basic safety, essential performance, monitoring method, and immunity pass/fail criteria for a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector during EMC testing under IEC 60601-1-2.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as Annex F-style EMC test condition and pass/fail criteria content for basic safety and essential performance documentation.
keyPoints: Essential performance includes normal operation when required, consistent DC power supply, normal operation of manufacturer-provided program, and intended acquisition image output.
During each EMC test, operation and transmission of stored information including essential performance items are visually monitored.
Specific detailed immunity pass/fail criteria are to be based on applicable part two standards or risk management and included in the risk management file.

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: The essential performance for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector during EMC test was defined as follows.

entities.name: Power solution #1 or #2
entities.evidence: DC power is consistently supplied from Power solution #1 or #2 when EMC test is performed.

entities.name: IEC 60601-1-2
entities.evidence: Specific test conditions for IEC 60601-1-2 BASIC SAFETY, ESSENTIAL PERFORMANCE

concepts.evidence: Description of BASIC SAFETY and ESSENTIAL PERFORMANCE

concepts.name: Essential Performance
concepts.evidence: The essential performance for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector during EMC test was defined as follows.

concepts.name: EMC test monitoring
concepts.evidence: During each EMC test, we monitored visually whether the device can operate and transmit the stored information including the essential performance items listed above.

concepts.name: Risk Management File
concepts.evidence: There pass/fail criteria shall be included in the RISK MANAGEMENT FILE

evidence.claim: The document provides specific test conditions for IEC 60601-1-2 basic safety and essential performance.
evidence.evidenceText: Specific test conditions for IEC 60601-1-2 BASIC SAFETY, ESSENTIAL PERFORMANCE

evidence.claim: The device covered by the essential performance criteria is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: The essential performance for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector during EMC test was defined as follows.

evidence.claim: Essential performance requires normal operation when operation is required.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation normally when operation is required

evidence.claim: Essential performance requires DC power to be consistently supplied from Power solution #1 or #2 during EMC testing.
evidence.evidenceText: DC power is consistently supplied from Power solution #1 or #2 when EMC test is performed.

evidence.claim: Essential performance requires the manufacturer-provided program to operate normally when connected to Power solution #1 or #2.
evidence.evidenceText: When connected to Power solution #1 or #2, program provided by manufacturer is operated normally.

evidence.claim: Essential performance requires the acquisition image to be obtained as intended.
evidence.evidenceText: Acquisition image is obtained as intended.

evidence.claim: During each EMC test, monitoring is visual and checks device operation and transmission of stored information including essential performance items.
evidence.evidenceText: During each EMC test, we monitored visually whether the device can operate and transmit the stored information including the essential performance items listed above.

evidence.claim: Detailed immunity pass/fail criteria should be based on applicable part two standards or risk management regarding EM disturbances.
evidence.evidenceText: Specific, detailed IMMUNITY pass/fail criteria, shall be based on applicable part two standards or RISK MANAGEMENT, for IMMUNITY with regard to EM DISTURBANCES.

evidence.claim: Immunity pass/fail criteria should be included in the risk management file.
evidence.evidenceText: There pass/fail criteria shall be included in the RISK MANAGEMENT FILE
